subcodes.first_line: O Hasan most excellent! His Holiness Imam Hasan - peace be upon him - hath spoken thus: "With me is the essence of knowledge; were I to reveal it..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسن احسن حضرت امام حسن علیه السلام میفرماید و عندی جوهر علم لو ابوح به
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @mystical themes
